[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001101 4
1 0110000 2
2 1101000 3
3 0100001 2
4 1011110 5
5 1011111 6
6 1001101 4
7 0110000 2

01 10 0000000 a

34 43 0000000 a
